abilities.name: toxic-debris
abilities.shortEffect: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
abilities.effect: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
abilities.flavorText: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

abilities.name: corrosion
abilities.shortEffect: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokémon when attempting to inflict poison.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it's a Steel or Poison type.
